failure_rate_lambda.description: Constant failure rate λ of the fax machine, determined from the condition that the probability of surviving 720 hours without failure is 0.80.

survival_time_T.description: The random variable representing the time (in hours) until the fax machine fails, following an exponential distribution with constant failure rate λ.

survival_probability_720.description: The probability that the machine survives for 720 hours without failure, P(T > 720) = 0.80, used to determine λ.

conditioning_time.description: The time (in hours) at which the machine is known to still be functioning, used as the conditioning event T > 600.

target_time.description: The time (in hours) for which we want to determine the probability of the machine still functioning, i.e., P(T > 800 | T > 600).
